{{Quote|The Star Destroyer ''Eradicator'' approaches; resistance is futile.|Imperial Officer|<ref name="Scoundrel's Luck">''[[Scoundrel's Luck]]''</ref>}}
The '''''Eradicator''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] that served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], it was in the process of impounding a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] near the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Mon Torri]] when the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] came out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. After the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], [[Reagal Eron]] served as the Star Destroyer's [[Chief gunnery officer/Legends|chief gunnery officer]].
